title: Ether climbs toward $2K as Bitmine buys ETH, Robinhood L2 boost
summary: Ether climbs toward $2K as Bitmine buys ETH, Robinhood L2 boost
briefing: ETH charts a path toward $2,000 as TradFi adoption, DAT buying and a long-awaited network upgrade boost investor interest.

title: Vanguard seeks digital assets chief after years of crypto skepticism
summary: Vanguard seeks digital assets chief after years of crypto skepticism
briefing: The asset manager is hiring a head of digital assets to lead its strategy for tokenization, stablecoins, blockchain infrastructure and client-facing products.

title: New Hampshire lawmakers to hold hearing on $100M Bitcoin bonds
summary: New Hampshire lawmakers to hold hearing on $100M Bitcoin bonds
briefing: The proposed bonds to be backed by cryptocurrency still need approval from New Hampshire Governor Kelly Ayotte and the state’s five-member executive council.

title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Here’s what happened in crypto today
briefing: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: Kraken wins $22M arbitration against former auditor Mazars
summary: Kraken wins $22M arbitration against former auditor Mazars
briefing: The crypto exchange's parent company says Mazars' withdrawal from its 2022 audit caused millions in damages and tied the dispute to Operation Chokepoint 2.0.

title: USDT wins payments, USDC wins DeFi as stablecoins diverge: Dune
summary: USDT wins payments, USDC wins DeFi as stablecoins diverge: Dune
briefing: Dune data shows Tether's USDT has become crypto’s dominant payments stablecoin while Circle's USDC powers DeFi, highlighting how blockchain choice shapes stablecoin use.

title: Tether invests in Mercado Bitcoin as blockchain finance expands in Latin America
summary: Tether invests in Mercado Bitcoin as blockchain finance expands in Latin America
briefing: Mercado Bitcoin will use the funding to expand tokenized finance across Latin America, adding to Tether's growing portfolio of infrastructure investments.

title: Nigel Farage to resign from UK Parliament amid crypto “gift” scandal, will stand in by-election
summary: Nigel Farage to resign from UK Parliament amid crypto “gift” scandal, will stand in by-election
briefing: The Reform party leader and Brexit champion confirmed that he was the subject of probes by UK authorities following reports of what he called “gifts” from figures tied to cry pto ventures.

title: AI Is Changing the Workplace and Universities Aren’t Keeping Up, Study Warns
summary: AI Is Changing the Workplace and Universities Aren’t Keeping Up, Study Warns
briefing: A University of Manchester researcher says schools should move beyond AI cheating concerns and prepare graduates for workplaces increasingly shaped by automation.

title: BIG3 NFT Buyers Sue Ice Cube's Basketball League Over Alleged Unfulfilled Promises
summary: BIG3 NFT Buyers Sue Ice Cube's Basketball League Over Alleged Unfulfilled Promises
briefing: Investors who purchased BIG3 NFTs expected the perks of team ownership, but allege "deceptive, fraudulent" marketing was at play.

title: China May Be Following US Lead With Quiet Crackdown on AI Exports
summary: China May Be Following US Lead With Quiet Crackdown on AI Exports
briefing: China is reportedly building the same power to cut off its AI that the US deployed against Anthropic in June.

title: Radar Chat Wants to Make Sending Bitcoin as Easy as Firing Off a Text
summary: Radar Chat Wants to Make Sending Bitcoin as Easy as Firing Off a Text
briefing: Built on Signal’s open-source technology, Radar Chat combines encrypted messaging with self-custodial Bitcoin payments via Lightning Network.

title: Kenya's Markets Regulator Seeks Blockchain Tool to Track Crypto Crime
summary: Kenya's Markets Regulator Seeks Blockchain Tool to Track Crypto Crime
briefing: The Capital Markets Authority wants to monitor over 20 blockchains for fraud, laundering, and sanctions evasion under Kenya's new crypto law.

title: Wintermute Cautions 'Relief Rally' Likely as Bitcoin Touches Highest Price in Weeks
summary: Wintermute Cautions 'Relief Rally' Likely as Bitcoin Touches Highest Price in Weeks
briefing: Market maker Wintermute remains cautious, suggesting that recent Bitcoin action is a relief rally rather than a fundamental market change.

title: Coinbase Wins UK License to Offer Stocks and Derivatives Alongside Crypto
summary: Coinbase Wins UK License to Offer Stocks and Derivatives Alongside Crypto
briefing: The FCA authorization lets the exchange offer equities and derivatives to UK users, a step toward its "everything exchange" ambitions.
